languages.text: "Да. Только в корни мы не ходили. Все прямо в Клети порешали. Вышли на бой шестеро, остался я один. Не навалились они на меня кучей, может и пощадил бы кого..."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."
languages.original_text: "Да. Только в корни мы не ходили. Все прямо в Клети порешали. Вышли на бой шестеро, остался я один. Не навалились они на меня кучей, может и пощадил бы кого..."

traits.locale_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. Had they not swarmed me, I might have spared a life or two."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. Had they not swarmed me, I might have spared a life or two."

"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."
"Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

languages.text: "Ja. Allerdings haben wir uns nicht in die Wurzeln gewagt. Wir haben alles hier im Käfig geregelt. Sechs von uns zogen in die Schlacht. Nur ich habe überlebt. Hätten sie mich nicht umschwärmt, hätte ich vielleicht jemanden retten können."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

traits.locale_text: "Ja. Allerdings haben wir uns nicht in die Wurzeln gewagt. Wir haben alles hier im Käfig geregelt. Sechs von uns zogen in die Schlacht. Nur ich habe überlebt. Hätten sie mich nicht umschwärmt, hätte ich vielleicht jemanden retten können."

languages.text: « Oui. Sauf que nous ne sommes pas allés dans les racines. Nous avons réglé la question ici même, dans la Cage. Six d'entre nous se sont affrontés en combat. Je suis le seul à avoir survécu. S'ils ne s'étaient pas tous rués sur moi, j'aurais pu en sauver certaines. »
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

traits.locale_text: « Oui. Sauf que nous ne sommes pas allés dans les racines. Nous avons réglé la question ici même, dans la Cage. Six d'entre nous se sont affrontés en combat. Je suis le seul à avoir survécu. S'ils ne s'étaient pas tous rués sur moi, j'aurais pu en sauver certaines. »

languages.text: «Sí, pero no llegamos a adentrarnos en las raíces. Lo zanjamos todo ahí mismo, en la Jaula. Seis de nosotros salimos para luchar. Solo yo sobreviví. Si no me hubiesen atacado todos a la vez, quizá habría quedado alguien más».
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, pero no llegamos a adentrarnos en las raíces. Lo zanjamos todo ahí mismo, en la Jaula. Seis de nosotros salimos para luchar. Solo yo sobreviví. Si no me hubiesen atacado todos a la vez, quizá habría quedado alguien más».

languages.text: "Evet. Biz köklere gitmedik. Her şeyi Kafes'te hallettik. Altı kişi savaştık. Geriye bir tek ben kaldım. Etrafımı sarmasalardı birisinin canını bağışlayabilirdim belki."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Biz köklere gitmedik. Her şeyi Kafes'te hallettik. Altı kişi savaştık. Geriye bir tek ben kaldım. Etrafımı sarmasalardı birisinin canını bağışlayabilirdim belki."

languages.text: “是的。只不过我们没有进入根系深处，在牢笼里就把事情解决了。我们六个出去迎战，最后就剩下我一个。要不是他们一起围攻我，我或许还能大发慈悲，饶某些人一命。”
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they all hadn't swarmed me, I might have spared someone."

traits.locale_text: “是的。只不过我们没有进入根系深处，在牢笼里就把事情解决了。我们六个出去迎战，最后就剩下我一个。要不是他们一起围攻我，我或许还能大发慈悲，饶某些人一命。”

languages.text: 「ええ、根元には行かなかった。籠の中で決着をつけた。6人が出て戦った。私は一人残った。彼らが襲ってこなければ、1、2人の命は助けることができたかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "Yes. Only we didn't go into the roots. We settled it all right there in the Cage. Six of us went out to fight. I was the only one left. If they hadn't swarmed me, I might have been able to spare a life or two."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、根元には行かなかった。籠の中で決着をつけた。6人が出て戦った。私は一人残った。彼らが襲ってこなければ、1、2人の命は助けることができたかもしれない。」
